== Notes for [[Item:Q103929|Q103929]] ==

http://www.jewishencyclopedia.com/articles/6494-gamaliel-i

[http://he.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D7%A9%D7%9E%D7%A2%D7%95%D7%9F_%D7%91%D7%9F_%D7%A0%D7%AA%D7%A0%D7%90%D7%9C '''רבי שמעון בן נתנאל''' ]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000016325110703

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
